summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. All 14 tests pass. VAL-UNMARSHAL-026 (pipe-separated aliases) confirmed with 7 tests covering primary, secondary, tertiary aliases, real NATS patterns, nested structs, complex configs, and omitempty. VAL-UNMARSHAL-027 (marshal primary name) confirmed with 5 tests verifying marshal always outputs first alias. VAL-UNMARSHAL-028 (case-insensitive aliases) confirmed with tests covering uppercase, mixed-case, and lowercase for both primary and secondary aliases. Implementation review confirms correct behavior in configFieldAliases() and parseTag().
